meaning: adj.逗人喜爱的,令人想拥抱的
examples: Happy birthday to my smiling and huggable grandpa.
Today one of her favorite products is Huggable Hangers.
Keep her entertained while on-the-go with this huggable character!
"Huggable lamb that I am, people tell me I'm a tough negotiator, " he says.
"Huggable lamb that I am, people tell me I'm a tough negotiator, " he jests.
